prompts:
/plan "in the apps/plugin project, we should have an account setting to enable/disable automatic enrichment when a property gets          
  imported, set the default value to true. Make sure we follow the setting when we import a property."
update docs and push updated files to git

/plan we need to add to the posting options configuration a location filter. it should be a type of location : City, Neighbourhood, Address, School, Postal Code. We should use a google autocomplete in the edit posting options or the add posting options in the plugin to select the location. We will send that data to the home-search-ca filter.
